title: Deep single-cell proteomics quantifies low-abundant embryonic transcription factors and lineage markers during induced pluripotent stem cell differentiation
description: Large-scale single-cell proteomics dataset using Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer with EvoCHIP technology. The dataset focuses on quantifying low-abundance embryonic transcription factors and lineage markers during induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC) differentiation. Data processed with DIA-NN in BGS Factory Report format.
notes: Large dataset (724 MB). EvoCHIP single-cell data with DIA-NN BGS Factory Report format. No publication DOI available at time of download. Dataset focuses on embryonic transcription factors and lineage markers during iPSC differentiation.
